name: Marketing Landing
appropriateWhen: The product must explain a supplied capability, campaign, launch, pricing model, proof point, or conversion path.
inappropriateWhen: The primary task is repeated operational work, dense administration, or long-form reading.
mobileStrategy: Preserve the capability-to-proof-to-action sequence, keep supplied proof adjacent to its claim, and retain one clear conversion action.
signatureMovePatterns: Turn supplied proof, product mechanism, or conversion path into the page rhythm.
validationRules: Claims are traceable to supplied evidence
